# Vectorax

> **Stage:** GitHub Prep  |  **ID:** `2b5ee29f`  |  **Updated:** 2026-03-26T06:17:15 by MacBook-Air-van-Gebruiker.local / lab

Fully local agentic AI system that lets AI agents and LLMs efficiently work with all code made for the Anki Vector robot — LangGraph RAG pipeline, ChromaDB vector store, Ollama LLM, 5-page dashboard, zero hallucinations on file citations
